info.name: Task Management System — Phase 2 API Collection
info.description:
Complete Postman collection for the Task Management System (TMS) backend API.

Tech Stack: Node.js + Express + PostgreSQL (Supabase) + Prisma + JWT

Base URL: http://localhost:5000

Instructions:
1. Run the Login request first.
2. The JWT token is automatically stored in the `authToken` collection variable.
3. All protected requests use {{authToken}} automatically.

Prepared by: Member E — API Verification Lead
Phase 2 — University Group Project

variable.description: JWT token — automatically set by the Login request
Set this to a valid user UUID after creating or listing users
Set this to a valid task UUID after creating or listing tasks
Set this to a valid project UUID after creating or listing projects

item.name: 🔐 Authentication
item.description: Authentication endpoints — Login, Register/Onboard, Change Password

exec: // Automatically store JWT token after successful login
console.log('✅ Token saved to collection variable: authToken');

response.name: 400 — Missing Credentials

exec: pm.test('New user has mustResetPassword: true', function () {
pm.test('Password not exposed in response', function () {

request.description:
Onboard a new user into the system. No authentication required.

Role must be one of: ADMINISTRATOR, PROJECT_MANAGER, COLLABORATOR

The new user will have `mustResetPassword: true` and must change their password on first login.

Expected: 201 Created with user object (no password field)

response.name: 201 — User Onboarded Successfully

request.description:
Change the authenticated user's password.

Requires a valid JWT in Authorization header (Bearer token).
Requires both `currentPassword` (must match DB) and `newPassword`.

On success, sets `mustResetPassword: false` in the database.

Expected: 200 OK

item.name: 👤 Users
item.description: User management endpoints. Most require ADMINISTRATOR role.

exec: pm.test('Users do not contain password fields', function () {
// Auto-store first user ID for subsequent requests

request.description:
Retrieve a list of all users in the system.

Required Roles: ADMINISTRATOR, PROJECT_MANAGER

Expected: 200 OK with array of user objects

Note: COLLABORATOR role will receive 403 Forbidden.

exec: console.log('✅ New user ID stored:', data.user.id);

request.description:
Create a new user in the system.

Required Role: ADMINISTRATOR only

Password will be hashed before storage. User will have `mustResetPassword: true` by default.

Expected: 201 Created with new user object

Retrieve a single user by their UUID.

Required Roles: ADMINISTRATOR, PROJECT_MANAGER

Replace `{{testUserId}}` with a valid user UUID.

Expected: 200 OK with user object or 404 if not found.

Update any user's fields (name, role, isActive).

Required Role: ADMINISTRATOR only

Expected: 200 OK with updated user object

Update the currently authenticated user's own profile.

Required Role: Any authenticated user

Updates the profile of the user identified by the JWT token.

Expected: 200 OK

Permanently delete a user by UUID.

Required Role: ADMINISTRATOR only

Cascade: Deletes all related comments, attachments, and notifications.

⚠️ WARNING: This action is irreversible. Update `testUserId` before running.

Expected: 200 OK with confirmation message

item.name: ✅ Tasks
item.description: Task management endpoints. Roles: ADMINISTRATOR and PROJECT_MANAGER have full access. COLLABORATOR can view own tasks and update status only.

query.description: Filter by status: TODO | IN_PROGRESS | COMPLETED
Filter by priority: LOW | MEDIUM | HIGH
Filter by assigned user UUID (ignored for Collaborators)

request.description:
Retrieve all tasks. Supports filtering and sorting via query parameters.

Role behavior:
- ADMINISTRATOR / PROJECT_MANAGER: All tasks returned
- COLLABORATOR: Only own assigned tasks returned (assignedUserId filter auto-applied)

Available filters (enable in Params tab):
- status: TODO | IN_PROGRESS | COMPLETED
- priority: LOW | MEDIUM | HIGH
- projectId: UUID
- assignedUserId: UUID
- sortBy: dueDate | priority | createdAt
- sortOrder: asc | desc

response.name: 200 — Tasks Retrieved
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "count": 2,
  "tasks": [
    {
      "id": "t1111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111",
      "title": "Implement JWT Authentication",
      "description": "Secure all endpoints with JWT middleware",
      "status": "TODO",
      "priority": "HIGH",
      "dueDate": "2026-06-30T12:00:00.000Z",
      "projectId": "p1111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111",
      "assignedUserId": "u2222222-2222-2222-2222-222222222222",
      "createdAt": "2026-06-16T00:00:00.000Z",
      "updatedAt": "2026-06-16T00:00:00.000Z"
    }
  ]
}

exec: pm.test('Task created with correct fields', function () {
pm.test('Task status defaults to TODO', function () {

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Implement JWT Middleware",
  "description": "Add JWT authentication middleware to protect all API routes",
  "priority": "HIGH",
  "status": "TODO",
  "dueDate": "2026-07-30T12:00:00Z",
  "projectId": "{{testProjectId}}",
  "assignedUserId": "{{testUserId}}"
}

request.description:
Create a new task.

Required Role: ADMINISTRATOR or PROJECT_MANAGER

Required fields: title, projectId, assignedUserId
Optional fields: description, priority (LOW|MEDIUM|HIGH), status (TODO|IN_PROGRESS|COMPLETED), dueDate

⚠️ Ensure `testProjectId` and `testUserId` are set in collection variables before running.

Expected: 201 Created with task object

Retrieve a single task by its UUID.

Role behavior:
- ADMINISTRATOR / PROJECT_MANAGER: Any task
- COLLABORATOR: Only own assigned tasks (403 for others)

Expected: 200 OK with task object or 404 if not found.

Update task fields.

Role behavior:
- ADMINISTRATOR / PROJECT_MANAGER: Can update all fields
- COLLABORATOR: Can only update `status` field if assigned to them (403 for other fields)

Expected: 200 OK with updated task

Assign or re-assign a task to a different user.

Required Role: ADMINISTRATOR or PROJECT_MANAGER

The assigned user must be active (`isActive: true`).

⚠️ Set `testTaskId` and `testUserId` in collection variables before running.

Expected: 200 OK with updated task

Permanently delete a task by UUID.

Required Role: ADMINISTRATOR or PROJECT_MANAGER

Cascade: Deletes all related Comments and Attachments for this task.

⚠️ WARNING: Irreversible action.

Expected: 200 OK with deletion confirmation

item.name: 📁 Projects
item.description: Project management endpoints. Requires ADMINISTRATOR or PROJECT_MANAGER role.

request.description:
Retrieve all projects.

Required Roles: ADMINISTRATOR, PROJECT_MANAGER

Expected: 200 OK with project list

Create a new project.

Required Roles: ADMINISTRATOR, PROJECT_MANAGER

Status options: PLANNING | IN_PROGRESS | ACTIVE | COMPLETED

Expected: 201 Created with project object

Get a project by its UUID.

Required Roles: ADMINISTRATOR, PROJECT_MANAGER

Expected: 200 OK with project details

exec: pm.test('Tasks array for project returned', function () {

request.description:
Get all tasks belonging to a specific project (Project Isolation endpoint).

Required Roles: Any authenticated user

Collaborators see only their own tasks within the project.

Expected: 200 OK with tasks array and count

Update a project's fields.

Required Roles: ADMINISTRATOR, PROJECT_MANAGER

Expected: 200 OK with updated project

Permanently delete a project and all its tasks.

Required Roles: ADMINISTRATOR, PROJECT_MANAGER

Cascade: Deletes all Tasks (and their Comments/Attachments) linked to this project.

⚠️ WARNING: Irreversible action.

Expected: 200 OK with deletion confirmation

Basic health check — confirms the backend server is running.

Expected: 200 OK with { message: '✅ TMS Backend Server is running!' }
